question.text: In the case of SEBI vs. Kanaiyalal Baldevbhai Patel (Case 8.2), what was the relationship between KB and Dipak Patel who was the portfolio manager of Passport India Investment (PII)?

answer.text: Dipak Patel was the brother-in-law of KB
Dipak Patel was a cousin of KB

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As stated in the case, Dipak Patel was the portfolio manager of PII and also happens to be a cousin of KB and AB (Anandkumar Baldevbhai Patel). **The Trap:** The family relationship is important because it establishes the channel through which non-public information was communicated. **Cross-Exam Context:** Front-running cases involving family connections are commonly tested in NISM Series III-A and Series VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Family relationships are a key risk area for front-running - compliance programs must include monitoring of trades by related persons.
